idea-plugin.name: Moka Git AI Commit
idea-plugin.description:
Moka Git AI Commit

Generate Git commit messages from staged changes using OpenAI-compatible AI models.

Getting Started

  1. Configure the OpenAI settings
    Open Settings and search for Moka Git AI Commit.
    • Enter your API URL and API Key.
    • Select a model. gpt-4o-mini is the default and recommended option.
    • Click Test Connection to verify your configuration.
  2. Create your prompt
    Open the Prompt tab and write instructions for the AI.

    Sample prompts are available here:
    Sample Prompt Examples
  3. Generate a commit message
    Open the Commit window using:
    Ctrl + K (Windows/Linux default IntelliJ shortcut)

    Then generate a commit message by:
    • Clicking the plugin button in the Commit window.
    • Using the plugin shortcut: Ctrl + Alt + C.

Features

  • Generate commit messages from Git diffs using OpenAI.
  • Fully customizable prompts.
  • Support for custom API URLs and OpenAI-compatible providers.
  • Model selection support.
  • Built-in connection testing.

action.description: Generate commit message using OpenAI API
